reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this VR game.  I enjoyed playing it. More please
It is colorful and fun to play.  Do recommend this for everyone to enjoy.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing and recommending! The official release of "Cell Breaker" to a free-to-play model, so you and everyone can continue or join the fun.

reviews.review_description: It's a good game but not worth the price

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We have switched the official release of "Cell Breaker" to a free-to-play model to allow more people to enjoy.

reviews.review_description:
the game was very simple to play. you can definitely get a workout from this game. Hopefully 
 in the newer releases the game duration get longer and more challenging.

developer_response.body: We are glad you enjoyed the Early Access version, and thank you for your feedback! Stay tuned, we will be periodically pushing updates to make improvements and fix bugs up until Cell Breaker leaves Early Access.
